languages.text: "Никак нет, Ваша Светлость! Здесь, на вашем флагмане, много непонятного и сложного, но мы трудностей не боимся. Мы к ним привыкли. Вы дали нам возможность обрести искупление и поверьте, каждый будет биться за него до конца".

"Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."
languages.original_text: "Никак нет, Ваша Светлость! Здесь, на вашем флагмане, много непонятного и сложного, но мы трудностей не боимся. Мы к ним привыкли. Вы дали нам возможность обрести искупление и поверьте, каждый будет биться за него до конца".

traits.locale_text: "Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to get atonement, and believe me — every one of us will fight for it until the end."

"Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."

"Are you joking, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Not one bit. Yes, life here is confusing and difficult, but we Merovians are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. It's just that now we're tackling them on a whole new battlefield."

"Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to get atonement, and believe me — every one of us will fight for it until the end."

"Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."

languages.text: 「冗談を言っているのですか、御{mf|御殿|御殿}様？冗談ではありません。はい、ここでの生活は混乱していて困難ですが、我々メロヴィアンは挑戦を恐れません。慣れています。ただ、今我々は全く新しい戦場でそれらに挑んでいるのです」
languages.original_text: "Are you joking, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}? Not one bit. Yes, life here is confusing and difficult, but we Merovians are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. It's just that now we're tackling them on a whole new battlefield."

languages.text: "Kesinlikle hayır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sancak geminizde hayat kafa karıştırıcı ve zor ancak zorluklardan korkmuyoruz. Biz bunlara alışkınız. Bize kefaretimizi ödeme şansı verdiniz ve inanın bana, her birimiz sonuna kadar bunun için savaşacağız."
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."

traits.locale_text: "Kesinlikle hayır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sancak geminizde hayat kafa karıştırıcı ve zor ancak zorluklardan korkmuyoruz. Biz bunlara alışkınız. Bize kefaretimizi ödeme şansı verdiniz ve inanın bana, her birimiz sonuna kadar bunun için savaşacağız."

languages.text: “完全不会，大人！在您旗舰上的生活，的确有些艰难，让人不知所措。但我们不怕挑战，我们早就习惯了。您给予了我们赢得赎罪的机会，我向您保证，我们每一个人都会为此奋战到底。”
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."

traits.locale_text: “完全不会，大人！在您旗舰上的生活，的确有些艰难，让人不知所措。但我们不怕挑战，我们早就习惯了。您给予了我们赢得赎罪的机会，我向您保证，我们每一个人都会为此奋战到底。”

languages.text: "Ganz und gar nicht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Das Leben hier auf Eurem Flaggschiff ist verwirrend und schwierig, aber wir fürchten keine Herausforderungen. Wir sind an sie gewöhnt. Ihr habt uns eine Chance auf Sühne gegeben, und glaubt mir, jeder von uns wird bis zum Ende kämpfen."
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."

traits.locale_text: "Ganz und gar nicht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Das Leben hier auf Eurem Flaggschiff ist verwirrend und schwierig, aber wir fürchten keine Herausforderungen. Wir sind an sie gewöhnt. Ihr habt uns eine Chance auf Sühne gegeben, und glaubt mir, jeder von uns wird bis zum Ende kämpfen."

languages.text: « Pas du tout, Votre Seigneurie ! Oui, tout ici nous déroute et nous allons avoir besoin de temps pour nous adapter, mais nous n'avons jamais eu peur de relever un défi. Nous y sommes même habitués. Grâce à vous, nous avons l'occasion de trouver l'expiation. Croyez-moi, nous nous battrons de toutes nos forces pour honorer cette chance. »
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."

traits.locale_text: « Pas du tout, Votre Seigneurie ! Oui, tout ici nous déroute et nous allons avoir besoin de temps pour nous adapter, mais nous n'avons jamais eu peur de relever un défi. Nous y sommes même habitués. Grâce à vous, nous avons l'occasion de trouver l'expiation. Croyez-moi, nous nous battrons de toutes nos forces pour honorer cette chance. »

languages.text: «¡En absoluto, mi{mf|lord|lady}! La vida a bordo de su nave insignia es confusa y difícil, pero no tememos a los desafíos. Estamos acostumbrados a ellos. Nos ha otorgado la oportunidad de la expiación y, créame, todos y cada uno de nosotros lucharemos por ello hasta el final».
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! Life here on your flagship is confusing and difficult, but we are not afraid of challenges. We're used to them. You have given us a chance to achieve atonement, and believe me, every one of us will fight for it until the end."

traits.locale_text: «¡En absoluto, mi{mf|lord|lady}! La vida a bordo de su nave insignia es confusa y difícil, pero no tememos a los desafíos. Estamos acostumbrados a ellos. Nos ha otorgado la oportunidad de la expiación y, créame, todos y cada uno de nosotros lucharemos por ello hasta el final».
